title: Kaikei v2 envelope
description: Top-level envelope (v2 contract) for every kaikei webhook delivery. The producing client identity is NOT carried here -- the receiver derives it from the per-client signing secret.

event_id.description: ULID (Crockford Base32, 26 chars). Deterministic per source event; the receiver dedups on this.

event_type.description: One of the supported event types.

schema_version.description: Contract version. The v2 envelope is schema_version 2; the v1 mirror is schema_version 1.

data.description: Per-event-type payload. Validated against the matching payload schema selected by event_type.
